2184730.name: Prisoners Hunt
2184730.description:
Prisoners Hunt is an online multiplayer game that combines elements of hide and seek and disguise in a dynamic environment.

Players on the Objects team have the ability to transform into any element of the surrounding decor, such as a chair, a street sign, a box, or even a flowerpot. Their goal is to blend into the background and stay hidden as long as possible without being spotted by hunters. They must use their environment to their advantage, choosing credible locations and avoiding moving suspiciously.

The other team, the Hunters, must find and eliminate the players disguised as objects. They have a limited time to find all the hidden objects. Hunters should be alert to anything that seems out of place or abnormal in the setting. However, shooting objects that are not disguised players can result in a penalty, often in the form of loss of life points.

Game mechanics:
Limited time: Objects must survive until the timer runs out to win the round.
Transformation: Objects can move and transform into other objects during gameplay, which adds a level of strategy.
Hunter Penalties: Hunters lose health or suffer penalties when attacking non-player objects.
Varied Game Modes: Some modes may introduce special powers, special items, or additional challenges for both teams.
Strategy and tip:
For Objects: Choose an object that blends well into the environment and avoid moving too often. Use cluttered areas to maximize your chances of going unnoticed.
For Hunters: Learn to spot inconsistencies in the environment and be patient. Shooting randomly can penalize you, so observe carefully before taking action.
PropHunt is loved for its light and accessible gameplay, which combines strategy, observation and a good dose of laughter. It's a perfect game to play with friends, where each game can bring its share of surprises and hilarious moments.
